note: Generated guardrail library, not authority — authority is per-run consolidation records (.okra/runs/<run-id>/memory/). Candidate-only until a current run ratifies an entry into its frame.

anti_goals.applies_when: any pumped-fn code is produced (src, examples, tests); pumped-lite-lint wired as a package script
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: example 11 tests green before and after reaching 0 diagnostics

anti_goals.threshold: 1 end-to-end run, exit 0, expected output observed, before acceptance
anti_goals.applies_when: anything labeled runnable or production-ready ships an entrypoint
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: main.ts ran green after fix; suites unaffected

anti_goals.applies_when: production entrypoints/composition roots; demo data enters via real input boundaries (stdin/files/queues) from fixtures/
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: NDJSON intake replaced embedded demo; 11 tests green

anti_goals.applies_when: pumped-fn app/example code; grep for Scope/ExecutionContext/handle-typed params outside composition roots; root privilege = create scope, exec flows, dispose
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: conversions net-negative LOC, suites green both rounds
anti_goals.ratification: user-caught twice (glue re-hid in main.ts once)

anti_goals.applies_when: flows composing flows — deps-declared handles (exec/execStream), never closure imports; a missing API for the idiom is a core-gap finding (FlowHandle.execStream precedent), not an excuse
anti_goals.invalidates_when: covered by lint_diagnostics if that is ratified

anti_goals.threshold: 1 per path where a stream carries must-not-drop work
source_refs: lite README Async Iteration conflation rule
anti_goals.applies_when: consumers of conflating channels (resolveStream/changes) touch work items; test = N pushes mid-consumption, each item lands exactly once
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: genuinely conflatable feeds (state views, tickers, heartbeats)
anti_goals.invalidates_when: core gains a lossless buffered stream mode
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: gated burst test passes; prior architecture demonstrably dropped batches
anti_goals.ratification: orchestrator-caught (orchestrator specced the lossy pattern itself)

anti_goals.applies_when: all tests: no hand-rolled type gymnastics (use expectTypeOf — it evaluates its argument), no never-executed scaffolding, for await over manual iterator driving unless the assertion is about protocol timing, succinct names
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: timing-sensitive assertions needing pending next() control
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: rewrites kept every invariant, suites green

anti_goals.threshold: frame style walls list source, tests, type-param naming, boundary rules explicitly
source_refs: retrospective: 4 post-green style catches all outside A4 as written
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: later packets with enumerated surfaces produced clean output first pass

anti_goals.threshold: 1 explicit false-positive pass per rejection heuristic before acceptance
source_refs: F3 narrowed twice: orchestrator .next catch + review-2 AsyncGenerator ruling
anti_goals.applies_when: walls implemented as runtime rejection heuristics

anti_goals.threshold: every LOC ceiling paired with one compression round (sweep + apply, revert-dont-weaken) before acceptance
source_refs: PKR-6 (-81) + DKR-3/PKR-7 (-18) after user pushed too-much-code twice under a held 400 ceiling
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: -99 total with zero behavior change, all tests unmodified

anti_goals.applies_when: all pumped-fn identifiers: no type suffixes on definition handles (store not storeAtom), prefix-free type params (Output/Input/Fault/Yield, never TOutput), files/factories named for the policy not the mechanism (latest.ts not conflating-iterator.ts), no jargon where a plain word carries the meaning; count = identifiers violating lib style at acceptance
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: a bare name would shadow an existing type in scope (TagExecutor Value-not-Tag precedent)
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: T-prefix strip and latest rename were pure renames, 180+ tests green, no .d.ts structural change
anti_goals.ratification: user-caught twice (conflatingIterator naming, T-prefixes), user-requested as wall 2026-07-05
